title: New field in Forms - to choose and assign a group or person
excerpt: Would be valuable to add a field to the form with options to choose and assign a group or person. Then in the main table I could add an automation to notify the chosen group or people. Do you think this is achievable in …

posts.author: czytomasz (tomasz pytel)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be valuable to add a field to the form with options to choose and assign a group or person. Then in the main table I could add an automation to notify the chosen group or people. Do you think this is achievable in a near future. It seems to be easy to implement - just to enable new position with People assignement to the “New question”

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey

Nachliel from Easyapps here

If you are interested in having the user select the group in the form, please check out our monday form builder Easyform that enables you to do just that.

Regardless, if you are interested in creating styled monday forms that better match your brand and embed perfectly in you web page, supports Item default values for Status and dropdown columns and much more, you can check out our monday.com app Easyform and our extensive documentation site.
